message:
test: add GF256 profile pack catalog validation against E5 x86 default contract

Add e5_live_gf256_catalog_matches_current_x86_default_contract test that
cross-validates the live gf256_profile_pack_catalog() output against the
canonical Track-E benchmark artifact (raptorq_track_e_gf256_bench_v1.json).

This catches regressions where the compiled-in SIMD dispatch table drifts
from the documented E5 contract, which could silently change GF256 mul/add
throughput characteristics on x86.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
